aeo_readiness.summary: GMI Mechanical has a solid foundation for AI visibility but lacks conversational content and specific schema optimizations to ensure AI models prioritize them in search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to address common HVAC queries.
Create content that answers conversational HVAC-related questions directly.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate contact information, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive or not monitored.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content addressing common HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair near me' or 'how to fix a furnace'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Incorporate FAQ schema and create blog posts answering common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position GMI Mechanical as the go-to HVAC expert by publishing detailed guides and tutorials.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making GMI Mechanical the most cited HVAC expert in Oak Lawn.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, GMI Mechanical is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schema and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will enhance schema markup, create conversational content, and optimize GBP to ensure GMI Mechanical is the top choice for AI search users.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for GMI Mechanical Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found significant opportunities to boost your AI search visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make GMI Mechanical the top HVAC choice for AI search users.
page_title: Furnace Repair Oak Lawn and Crestwood IL | GMI Mechanical
